data.name: TablesFailedToLoad
data.value: One or more tables failed to load.

data.name: InvalidTableParameter
data.value: Parameter '{0}' of type '{1}' is not a StaticDataTable<,> subtype.

data.name: TableConstructorNotFound
data.value: {0} must have a constructor accepting ImmutableList<{1}>.

data.name: FkTargetNotFound
data.value: FK target '{0}' not found or disabled.

data.name: SwitchFkConditionColumnNotFound
data.value: Switch FK condition column '{0}' not found on {1}.

data.name: FkTargetIsSingleColumnCollection
data.value: FK target column '{0}' on {1} is a SingleColumnCollection; FK targets must be scalar columns.

data.name: EnumValueNotDefined
data.value: '{0}' is not a defined value of enum '{1}'

data.name: KeyAttributeRequired
data.value: Value type '{0}' must have a parameter with [Key] attribute.
